title: Kick-start your career in sports and fitness with ETA College
description: BUSINESS NEWS - For high-energy and sporty...
bodyText:
Advertorial

BUSINESS NEWS - For high-energy and sporty matriculants not yet sure what career path to follow now that they have matriculated, ETA College in George offers an excellent opportunity to equip themselves for a career in the world of sport and exercise.


> With internationally accredited qualifications ranging from higher certificates to bachelor's degrees, ETA College ensures you don't need to travel far to gain world-class education.


ETA's sport and fitness courses are tailored for those who love physical activity, offering specialised training for careers in fitness instruction, personal training, and wellness management. Additionally, the college provides a business management bachelor's degree, enabling students to combine their passion for sport with business skills.

For those interested in education, ETA's qualifications serve as building blocks for careers in teaching, particularly as PT specialists or wellness officers.


> A professional qualification from ETA significantly enhances your employability, making you a top choice for leading schools and fitness institutions.


ETA's unique approach goes beyond academics and physical training. The college places a strong emphasis on spiritual and personal growth. "Life is about much more than the physical," says campus manager Armand Gerber. "Parents are often amazed by the personal development their children undergo during their time with us."

Real-world preparationETA College ensures students are job-ready upon graduation. "We focus on developing individuals who can step into the working world with confidence, whether it's starting their own business, becoming fitness instructors, or managing fitness facilities," says Gerber.

Through hands-on experience - like running physical education programmes for organisations such as Up With Downs School - students gain invaluable real-world skills.


> ETA being a member of University Sport South Africa (USSA), its students also compete nationally in various sports codes.


The college fosters a family-oriented atmosphere, ensuring every student receives personalised support. "We leave no student behind," says Gerber.

Ready to take the next step? Contact ETA on 044 873 0842 or [email protected].

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
